mapper.sql: a.id, a.app_key, a.name, a.developer_id, a.submit_source, a.category_id, c.name AS category_name, a.icon_url, a.summary, a.description, a.supported_os_types, a.supported_archs, a.screenshots, a.status, a.is_official, a.is_featured, a.sort_weight, a.download_count, a.rating_score, a.rating_count, a.published_at, a.rejected_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.created_by, a.updated_by, latest_version.version_name AS latest_version_name, COALESCE(package_stats.package_count, 0) AS package_count, tag_stats.tag_names AS tag_names

LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT app_id, MAX(version_name) AS version_name FROM app_versions WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_latest = 1 GROUP BY app_id ) latest_version ON latest_version.app_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT app_id, COUNT(1) AS package_count FROM app_packages WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY app_id ) package_stats ON package_stats.app_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT at.app_id, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name ORDER BY t.id SEPARATOR ',') AS tag_names FROM app_tags at INNER JOIN tags t ON t.id = at.tag_id GROUP BY at.app_id ) tag_stats ON tag_stats.app_id = a.id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM apps WHERE app_key = #{appKey} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM categories WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apps (app_key, name, developer_id, submit_source, category_id, icon_url, summary, description, supported_os_types, supported_archs, screenshots, status, is_official, is_featured, sort_weight, download_count, rating_score, rating_count, published_at, rejected_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{appKey}, #{name}, #{developerId}, #{submitSource}, #{categoryId}, #{iconUrl}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{supportedOsTypes}, #{supportedArchs}, #{screenshots}, #{status}, #{isOfficial}, #{isFeatured}, #{sortWeight}, #{downloadCount}, #{ratingScore}, #{ratingCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{rejectedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})

INSERT INTO app_versions (app_id, version_name, version_code, changelog, submit_source, status, is_latest, submitted_at, reviewed_at, published_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{appId}, #{versionName}, #{versionCode}, #{changelog}, #{submitSource}, #{status}, #{isLatest}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewedAt}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})

INSERT INTO app_packages (app_id, version_id, os_type, arch, package_format, file_name, file_size, storage_path, cdn_url, sha256, signature_algorithm, signature_value, signature_status, signature_verified_at, status, download_count, scan_status, scan_report, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{appId}, #{versionId}, #{osType}, #{arch}, #{packageFormat}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{storagePath}, #{cdnUrl}, #{sha256}, #{signatureAlgorithm}, #{signatureValue}, #{signatureStatus}, #{signatureVerifiedAt}, #{status}, #{downloadCount}, #{scanStatus}, #{scanReport}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
INSERT IGNORE INTO app_tags (app_id, tag_id, created_at) VALUES (#{appId}, #{tagId}, NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM apps a WHERE

SELECT FROM apps a
WHERE ORDER BY a.sort_weight DESC, a.updated_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM apps a
WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE apps SET name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, icon_url = #{iconUrl}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, supported_os_types = #{supportedOsTypes}, supported_archs = #{supportedArchs}, screenshots = #{screenshots}, is_official = #{isOfficial}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, sort_weight = #{sortWeight}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE app_versions SET is_latest = 0, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND is_latest = 1
mapper.select: SELECT id, app_id, version_name, version_code, changelog, submit_source, status, is_latest, submitted_at, reviewed_at, published_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM app_versions WHERE id = #{versionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT id, app_id, version_name, version_code, changelog, submit_source, status, is_latest, submitted_at, reviewed_at, published_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM app_versions WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY is_latest DESC, version_code DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, app_id, version_id, os_type, arch, package_format, file_name, file_size, storage_path, cdn_url, sha256, signature_algorithm, signature_value, signature_status, signature_verified_at, status, download_count, scan_status, scan_report, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM app_packages WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, app_id, version_id, os_type, arch, package_format, file_name, file_size, storage_path, cdn_url, sha256, signature_algorithm, signature_value, signature_status, signature_verified_at, status, download_count, scan_status, scan_report, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM app_packages WHERE id = #{packageId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_packages SET scan_status = #{scanStatus}, scan_report = #{scanReport}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{packageId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE apps SET status = #{status}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE apps SET status = #{status}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE app_versions SET status = 2, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN (0, 1)
UPDATE apps SET status = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN (0, 3, 4)

UPDATE app_versions SET status = 1, submitted_at = COALESCE(submitted_at, NOW(3)), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{versionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN (0, 3, 4)

UPDATE app_versions SET status = 1, submitted_at = COALESCE(submitted_at, NOW(3)), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN (0, 3, 4)

UPDATE app_versions SET status = 2, is_latest = 1, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{versionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE apps SET status = 4, rejected_at = #{rejectedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE app_versions SET status = 3, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{versionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE app_versions SET status = 3, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN (0, 1)
